cool. anyway heres a brownie recipe
115 g (½ cup) butter
• 200 g (1 cup) sugar
• 2 eggs
• 1 tsp vanilla extract
• 40 g (⅓ cup) cocoa powder
• 65 g (½ cup) all-purpose flour
• ¼ tsp salt
• Optional: chocolate chips or nuts

Steps
1. Preheat oven to 175°C / 350°F.
Line or grease a baking pan.
2. Melt butter in a bowl (microwave or stovetop).
3. Mix in sugar, then add eggs one at a time.
Stir in vanilla.
4. Add cocoa powder, flour, and salt.
Mix just until combined (don’t overmix!).
5. Fold in extras if using.
6. Pour into pan and smooth the top.
7. Bake 20–25 minutes
A toothpick should come out with a few moist crumbs.
8. Cool, cut, and enjoy 😋

Tips
• Want fudgy brownies? Bake closer to 20 min.
• Want cakey brownies? Bake closer to 25–28 min.

Here’s a simple homemade brownie recipe you can make easily 🍫
🍫 Easy Chocolate Brownies
📝 Ingredients:
1/2 cup (115g) butter
1 cup sugar
2 eggs
1 tsp vanilla extract
1/3 cup cocoa powder
1/2 cup flour
1/4 tsp salt
Optional: chocolate chips or nuts
👨‍🍳 Instructions:
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F).
Melt the butter (microwave or stovetop).
Mix melted butter + sugar together.
Add eggs and vanilla. Mix well.
Add cocoa powder, flour, and salt. Mix until smooth (don’t overmix).
Pour into a greased baking pan.
Bake for 20–25 minutes.
Let cool before cutting (this makes them fudgier).
🔥 Tips:
For extra fudgy brownies → bake a little less time.
For cakey brownies → bake a little longer.
Add chocolate chips for extra gooey taste

comments.text: I remember this game like yesterday. The first goal came in during the first minutes of the match, then David Luiz save on the line, and after that the second and third goal. I was at a Brazilian 🇧🇷 pizza restaurant here in San Juan Puerto Rico 🇵🇷, the place was packed. Back then I was a diehard Brazil fan and the favorites to win was obviously Spain. I remember I watched that game with both my father and a former Gremio player who owned a football club here in San Juan, he was obviously Brazilian. Both my father and him (Vitor Hugo) are not with us anymore, and this is probably one of the best memories I had with both of them. Great games create memorable times. ❤️❤️❤️
